---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a template, flag, or capability for PluginForge
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

What can't you do today, or what's painful about the current flow?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like PluginForge to do. If it's a new template, sketch the file
layout it should generate.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways you've thought about solving this.

## Scope check

PluginForge stays minimal until a feature earns its place. Why does this belong
in core rather than as a one-off edit after generation?

## Additional context

Links, examples, prior art.
